common.metaDescription: An AI-powered job matching platform for Swedish job seekers. Upload a CV, search jobs, and generate cover letters.

landing.subtitle: Upload your CV. We extract your skills, match you with jobs from Arbetsförmedlingen, and generate tailored cover letters.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Upload. Match. Apply. Three simple steps.

upload.title: Upload your CV
upload.description: AI reads your CV and extracts your skills so you don’t have to enter them manually.

search.title: Find matching jobs
search.description: Search Arbetsförmedlingen’s full job database, filtered and ranked by your skills.

generate.title: Generate cover letters
generate.description: Get a personalized cover letter for each job, based on your CV and the job listing.

auth.signInDescription: Enter your email to receive a magic link
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link to sign in.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.signUpDescription: Enter your email and create a password
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSentDescription: We sent a password reset link to {email}.
auth.updatePasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetLinkInvalidDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.signUpCheckEmailDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to verify your account.
auth.signUpRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.signUpEmailFailed: Could not send verification email. Please try again later.

dashboard.documentDialogDescription: Review and edit the text we use to match jobs and generate cover letters.
dashboard.replaceDocumentDescription: Upload a new file to replace your current document.

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.noSkills: No skills extracted yet. Upload a CV to get started.
skills.addPlaceholder: Type a skill and press Enter

letterGuidance.title: Default guidance for generated letters
letterGuidance.description: Add reusable pointers for how your personal letters should sound. You can still override this per job.
letterGuidance.placeholder: Example: Keep the tone concise and practical, mention teamwork and warehouse safety.
letterGuidance.hint: This default is applied to future generated letters unless you override it on a job listing.

prompt.title: Welcome to your dashboard!
prompt.description: Here you can manage documents, skills, saved jobs, and generated letters. Want a detailed walkthrough?

nav.title: Top navigation overview
nav.description: This top bar is your main navigation between Dashboard, Jobs, and Letters.

navJobs.title: Jobs button
navJobs.description: Use this button when you want to search new listings or open your saved jobs tab.

navLetters.title: Brev / Letters button
navLetters.description: This takes you to generated letters so you can review and reuse them.

language.title: Language switcher
language.description: Switch between Swedish and English at any time from this control.

documents.title: Documents section
documents.description: Your CV and personal letter live here. Open cards to review and edit content.

uploadNew.title: Upload new file button
uploadNew.description: Use "Upload New" to replace your current document with a newer version.

editDocument.title: Edit document flow
editDocument.description: Click a document card, then choose Edit in the dialog to update parsed text before matching.

skills.title: Skills editor
skills.description: These skills drive matching quality across searches and ranking.

skillsAdd.title: Add skills
skillsAdd.description: Click "Add skill", type a skill, and press Enter to include it.

skillsRemove.title: Remove skills
skillsRemove.description: Hover a skill chip and click the X button to remove it.

savedJobs.title: Saved jobs panel
savedJobs.description: If you have saved jobs, they appear here with quick access back to listings.

helpButton.title: Guide controls
helpButton.description: Use this question mark anytime to replay this guide or restart onboarding.

goToJobs.title: Go to Jobs via top navigation
goToJobs.description: Now click the Jobs button in the top bar. We will continue the walkthrough there.

navJobs.title: Jobs page confirmed
navJobs.description: Great. You are now on Jobs where all searching and saving happens.

searchBar.title: How to search
searchBar.description: Type keywords, role names, tools, or industries. Add a region if you want location hints.

keywordTips.title: Keyword input tips
keywordTips.description: Use short focused terms first, then refine. Example: "lager", "truck", "administration".

skillsMode.title: Skills-only search mode
skillsMode.description: If you keep keyword empty and use selected skills, search runs per skill to broaden discovery.

keywordRanking.title: Keyword + skill ranking
keywordRanking.description: When you search with keywords, results are still sorted using skill matching signals where possible.

savedTab.title: Sparade / Saved tab
savedTab.description: Open this tab to find jobs you saved earlier and return to them quickly.

savedList.title: Saved jobs access
savedList.description: If you have saved jobs, they appear here and can be opened or removed.

openListing.title: Open a listing
openListing.description: Open any job card to view full details. We will continue the guide on that listing page.

actions.title: Listing action area
actions.description: From here you can save this job and generate a personalized letter.

guidance.title: Custom generation pointers
guidance.description: Write your own prompt pointers here (tone, focus, examples) before generating.

generate.title: Generate personalized letter
generate.description: Click this to generate a tailored letter using your CV, optional personal letter, and your custom pointers.

letters.title: Brev button
letters.description: Use the Brev/Letters button in top nav to review generated letters.

language.title: Language switch reminder
language.description: You can switch interface language anytime while keeping your data intact.

replay.title: Guide completed
replay.description: You can replay this guide or redo onboarding anytime from the question mark button.

jobs.title: Search Jobs
jobs.searchPlaceholderUnified: Search by job title, skill, or keyword...

searchStatus.searchingFoundPending: Found {count} jobs so far ({pending} searches left)...
searchStatus.noResults: No jobs found matching your search

jobs.noResults: No jobs found. Try a different search term.
jobs.enterSearch: Enter a search term or select skills to find jobs
jobs.noSkillsFound: No skills found. Upload a CV and extract skills first.
jobs.noJobSkills: No skills found for this job
jobs.skillSearchPartialFailure: Some skill searches failed ({count}). Showing partial results.
jobs.errorNoSearchTerm: Please enter a search term or select skills
jobs.errorSelectSkill: Please select at least one skill
jobs.savedJobsDescription: Jobs you've saved appear here so you can revisit them anytime.
jobs.savedJobsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No saved jobs} =1 {1 saved job} other {# saved jobs}}
jobs.savedJobsEmpty: No saved jobs yet. Save jobs from search results.
jobs.savedJobsSomeUnavailable: Some saved jobs are no longer available

actions.guidancePlaceholder: Example: Keep the tone concise, mention customer handling and forklift safety.
actions.guidanceHelp: These pointers apply to this generation request.

letters.title: Generated Letters
letters.empty: No letters generated yet. Search for jobs and generate personal letters.
letters.aiAdapted: Personal Letter AI-adapted for this job

welcome.greeting: Hi! I'm your job search companion. Let's get you set up — it only takes a few minutes.

documents.guide: Upload your CV so I can extract your skills and match you to relevant jobs. Personal letter is optional.
documents.cvPrompt: Upload your CV and I'll analyze it to find jobs that match your experience.
documents.letterPrompt: If you have a personal letter, I can use it as a reference for your writing style. This is optional.
documents.tip: You can replace these anytime from your dashboard.
documents.replayChoiceGuide: Use your existing CV or upload a new one for this onboarding replay.

skills.found: I found these skills in your CV. On the Jobs page, you'll search using these — so make sure they look right.
skills.guide: These skills power your job matching. Tweak them now so your searches and highlights feel accurate.
skills.tip: Tip: If you update your CV later, regenerate skills from the dashboard. You can always edit skills manually too.

jobs.searching: Let me search for jobs matching your skills.
jobs.results: Save jobs you like — you can generate personalized cover letters for them later.
jobs.guide: This is the same Jobs search you'll use later. Try searching with your skills, add a keyword if you want, and save a few jobs to your shortlist.
jobs.tip: Tip: Use the Saved tab to revisit your shortlist and generate letters later.
jobs.seeMore: See more on the Jobs page
jobs.noResults: No jobs found for these skills yet. Try adjusting your skills or check the Jobs page later.

completion.message: You're all set! Here's what you can do now:
completion.tip: Come back anytime to update your CV, manage skills, or generate new letters.

tips.editCv: Edit or replace your CV anytime from the dashboard.
tips.regenerateSkills: After you update your CV, regenerate skills from the dashboard for better matching.
tips.saveJobs: Save jobs to build a shortlist you can return to.
tips.generateLetters: Generate tailored cover letters from your saved jobs when you're ready.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Upgrade to Pro to unlock much higher monthly AI limits.

upload.dropCV: Click to upload CV (PDF, DOCX, or TXT)
upload.dropPersonalLetter: Click to upload Personal Letter (PDF, DOCX, or TXT)
upload.invalidType: File must be PDF, DOCX, or TXT
